description: Create a content slide titled 'Secondaries is a large market with an expanding set of opportunities' with a stacked vertical bar chart of annual secondary transaction volume and a two-series line chart of LP portfolio pricing, arranged in a full stacked layout.

header.headline: Secondaries is a large market with an expanding set of opportunities

main.body: Annual secondary transaction volume ($B); LP portfolio pricing (% of NAV)

footer.source: 1 Source: Evercore report issued January 2026. Transaction volume is inclusive of all private markets, including buyout, private credit, infrastructure, and venture. 2 Source: Jefferies report issued January 2026.
